playbook.intent: Stale component -> updated spec + tokens + variants + code-connect + changelog.
playbook.scope: Designer or DS engineer ships an update to a single component. Includes spec refresh, token alignment, variant regression check, code-connect refresh, and changelog publication to consumers. Done when consumers have been notified and the new version is on the registry.

stage.name: Spec refresh
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after a peer review.

tasks.task: Map every value to a semantic token
Add new tokens only if necessary, with rationale

stage.name: Variant regression
stage.intent: Variants stay stable across modes + states.

tasks.task: Test each variant in light + dark modes
Run a11y regression on flagship variants

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with green regression on flagship variants.

tasks.task: Validate prop drift between design + code

stage.name: Ship + changelog
stage.intent: Consumers know what changed before they hit it.

tasks.task: Publish changelog entry with migration notes
Notify consumers in the DS channel

extra.value: [Hidden off-token values -> drift creeps in, Skipping regression on rare variants -> production breakage, No changelog -> consumers find out by getting paged]
['Is token-lint green?', 'Did regression pass on every variant?', 'Did consumers read the changelog?']

{human: faion get-content design-system-component-update-single-component --format md, agent: faion get-content design-system-component-update-single-component --format context, json: faion get-content design-system-component-update-single-component --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
